name: NavToggle
description: A simple icon component that switches between open and close panel icons based on toggle state.
usage_guidelines: Use for sidebar or navigation panel toggle buttons.
Icon changes based on toggled prop.
Typically used with Drawer or sidebar components.

toggled.description: Toggle state determining which icon to show.

styling_info.visual_description: Shows panel-right-open icon when not toggled, panel-right-close when toggled.

Dont: Don't use for other toggle purposes
Don't forget to handle click events

Example.title: Example
